data.title: Gemini 3 now default AI model for Google Search globally, facilitating smooth switch from AI Overviews to conversational AI Mode.
data.description: The popular search engine Google has implemented an upgrade to its Search functionality by introducing Gemini 3 as the standard AI model on a global scale. This advancement allows for smooth switching between AI Overviews and conversational AI Mode. Users can now experience enhanced search capabilities with this latest development.

data.title: Inventor from Las Vegas creates new multitool (BEC-531) for elevator technicians to open doors, make connections, and more.
data.description: In Pittsburgh on January 28, 2026, an inventor from Las Vegas, Nevada, shared his innovative creation of a multitool designed for elevator repair professionals. The tool, called the PICK, serves various functions such as opening and wedging doors, making wire connections, illuminating dark hoist ways, and facilitating note-taking. This versatile gadget caters to the specific needs of elevator maintenance workers, offering enhanced functionality in their daily tasks.

data.title: ePayPolicy named 2026 leader by Gartner in multiple categories, with high customer satisfaction.
data.description: ePayPolicy, a leader in the digital payments sector for insurance in Austin, Texas, received top customer ratings from Gartner Digital Markets, showcasing its exceptional customer satisfaction and market leadership. The recognition on Jan. 28, 2026, emphasizes the company's strong position with satisfied customers.

data.title: Bitcoin and Ethereum cautious as they trade range-bound, with low-conviction sentiment. NUPL shifted from belief to anxiety. (characters: 127)
data.description: Bitcoin (BTC) and Ethereum (ETH) are commencing the first quarter with a reserved outlook following a period of trading within set ranges. The recent report "Charting Crypto Q1" by Glassnode and Coinbase Institutional indicated that Bitcoin is currently in a phase of low-confidence sentiment. The Net Unrealized Profit/Loss (NUPL) indicator moved from a belief stance to anxiety during a liquidation event in October. This change typically corresponds with consolidation periods in historical terms. For more details, the complete article can be found on Benzinga.com.

data.title: XRP Community Day 2026 on Feb 11 with Garlinghouse, Long to cover ETFs, tokenization, and wrapped XRP in 3 sessions.
data.description: The XRP Community Day 2026 by Ripple (XRP) showcased CEO Brad Garlinghouse and President Monica Long engaging in discussions on ETFs, tokenization, and wrapped XRP during three international sessions.

data.title: EDO launches EDO Always-On for automated TV outcomes measurement, expands platform to deliver data to media partners.
data.description: In New York, EDO, a TV outcomes firm, introduced EDO Always-On, a new cross-platform measurement solution aimed at providing automated, scaled performance data directly to media partners’ exclusive data systems. The new feature expands EDO’s existing measurement of TV and converged campaigns, offering continuous outcomes reporting for all brands and categories across premium video platforms. EDO Always-On signifies the realization of EDO’s long-term goal to increase its scale and reach in the industry.

data.title: MKS prices private offering of €1 billion 4.250% senior notes due 2034, expected to close on Feb 4.
data.description: In Andover, Massachusetts on January 28, 2026, MKS Inc. (NASDAQ: MKSI) disclosed the pricing details of its private offering, consisting of €1.0 billion aggregate principal amount in 4.250% senior notes due 2034. Expected to conclude on February 4, 2026, the offering is contingent upon meeting standard closing prerequisites.

data.title: Hospitality, media, and sports giants join effort against human trafficking before Super Bowl LX in San Francisco. NFL Ambassadors support It's a Penalty campaign. #EndHumanTrafficking.
data.description: A campaign called It's a Penalty Super Bowl LX is leveraging sports to raise awareness and equip the public in fighting human trafficking. The initiative kicked off its 23rd global campaign in the San Francisco Bay Area, California on January 28, 2026.

data.title: VCA Canada named one of Alberta's Top Employers for 2026, highlighting commitment to veterinary care.
data.description: In Calgary, Alberta, VCA Canada, a prominent name in veterinary care, is pleased to share that they have earned recognition as one of Alberta's Top Employers for 2026. This accolade is part of the prestigious Alberta's Top Employers competition, an annual event led by the editors of Canada's Top 100. This title solidifies VCA Canada's position as a leading employer in the region and showcases their commitment to providing exceptional workplace environments.

data.title: Dealerware and myKaarma partner to simplify service lane, improving workflows, reducing friction. News released on Jan. 28, 2026.
data.description: In a recent announcement from Austin, Texas on January 28, 2026, Dealerware, a prominent fleet management and mobility platform for automotive retailers, revealed a new integration. This collaboration aims to streamline service, fleet, and customer workflows to enhance operational visibility and decrease inefficiencies. This development showcases the company's commitment to organizational efficiency and customer satisfaction.

data.title: Global Tyre brand, Radar Tyres partners with Cricket South Africa as Global Partner for Proteas, across all major formats.Characters: 116
data.description: In Singapore on January 28, 2026, Radar Tyres revealed their new partnership with Cricket South Africa (CSA), securing a significant multi-year deal. This deal designates Radar Tyres as the Global Partner for the Proteas in all main formats. The partnership will include various promotional activities and sponsorships to boost both brands.

data.title: Inventor from San Antonio creates LOW-AB exercise product, aims to target lower abs, provides alternative to sit-ups.
data.description: In Pittsburgh on January 28, 2026, an inventor hailing from San Antonio, Texas, expressed his motivation in creating the LOW-AB exercise product. The innovator aimed to effectively focus on the lower abdominal area with this new product, providing a better alternative to traditional sit-ups and crunches. The product is designed to cater specifically to improving this region and is anticipated to offer significant benefits for fitness enthusiasts.

data.title: NIIT MTS reports Q3 FY 2026 results: Revenue Rs. 499.7 Cr (5% QoQ, 19% YoY), EBITDA Rs. 103.8 Cr, PAT Rs. 74.3 Cr.106 MTS clients.
data.description: In the third quarter of the fiscal year 2026, NIIT’s Multinational Technology Solutions (MTS) division showcased a notable financial performance. The revenue stood at Rs. 499.7 Crores, marking a 5% increase compared to the previous quarter and a 19% surge from the same period last year. The EBITDA touched Rs. 103.8 Crores with an EBITDA margin of 21%, climbing 46 basis points quarter-on-quarter. The Profit After Tax (PAT) reached Rs. 74.3 Crores, exhibiting a substantial 58% rise from the previous quarter and a 20% increase year-on-year. Additionally, the company onboarded 4 new MTS clients during the quarter, bringing the total client count to 107, with revenue visibility reaching USD 415 million. AI-enabled solutions contributed 11% to the revenue. NIIT also made a strategic acquisition in January 2026 by purchasing San Francisco-based SweetRush, Inc. The consolidated financials for the quarter, in Crores, are as follows: Net Revenue - 499.7 (Q3 FY26) vs. 475.7 (Q2 FY26), a 5% increase, and vs. 418.9 (Q3 FY25), a 19% increase; EBITDA - 103.8 (Q3 FY26) vs. 96.6 (Q2 FY26), a 7% increase, and vs. 94.6 (Q3 FY25), a 10% increase; EBITDA % - 21% (Q3 FY26) vs. 20% (Q2 FY26), a 46 basis points increase, and vs. 23% (Q3 FY25). For further details, the complete story can be accessed on Benzinga.com.

data.title: Prosperity Bancshares and Stellar Bancorp merger creates Texas' second largest bank. Deal valued at $2.002 billion.
data.description: Shares of Prosperity Bancshares, Inc. (NYSE: PB) and Stellar Bancorp, Inc. (NYSE: STEL) are moving in different directions following the announcement of their earnings releases and a merger deal. Under this agreement, Prosperity will pay 0.3803 shares of its common stock and $11.36 in cash for each share of Stellar common stock. With Prosperity's closing price at $72.90 on January 27, 2026, the merger is valued at about $2.002 billion. The merger has received unanimous approval from both companies' Boards of Directors and is anticipated to be completed in the second quarter of 2026, subject to regulatory approvals and standard closing conditions. David Zalman, the Senior Chairman and Chief Executive Officer, will be overseeing the merger process.

data.title: TI (Nasdaq: TXN) to webcast capital management review on Feb 24, 10am CT, led by Haviv Ilan and Rafael Lizardi.
data.description: Texas Instruments Incorporated (TI) (Nasdaq: TXN) has announced that their capital management review will be webcast on February 24, 2026, at 10 a.m. Central time. The event will feature Haviv Ilan, the chairman, president, and CEO, along with Rafael Lizardi, the senior vice president. This webcast is expected to provide crucial insights into the company's financial strategies and future plans.
